summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Cape Ember Coffee e-commerce website. All backend APIs (19/19) and frontend features tested successfully. No critical or major bugs found.

backend_issues.notes: All 19 backend API endpoints tested and working correctly. 100% success rate.

passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint working
Backend: All 5 products loading correctly (4 individual + 1 bundle)
Backend: Product detail endpoint working
Backend: User registration with JWT token generation
Backend: User login with authentication
Backend: Get current user endpoint
Backend: Cart operations (get, add, update, remove, clear)
Backend: Order creation with WhatsApp link generation
Backend: Get user orders
Backend: PayFast payment integration (sandbox mode)
Backend: Subscription creation and management
Backend: Newsletter subscription
Backend: AI recommendations using Emergent LLM
Backend: Quick recommendations (public endpoint)
Frontend: Homepage loads with hero section, products, navigation
Frontend: Shop page displays all 5 products with working filters
Frontend: Product detail page shows product info and add to cart
Frontend: User registration flow via AuthModal
Frontend: Cart functionality (add, update quantity, remove items)
Frontend: Checkout page with complete shipping address form
Frontend: Subscription checkbox and frequency selector on checkout
Frontend: PayFast payment button integration
Frontend: WhatsApp help link on checkout page
Frontend: Navigation between all pages (home, shop, product, cart, checkout, account, subscriptions)
Frontend: Footer with WhatsApp link and newsletter subscription
Frontend: Account page with Orders, Subscriptions, and Profile tabs
Frontend: Subscriptions page with product listings and FAQ
